mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE 1 = 1
AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE status IN ('PENDING_DEVICE_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_SYSTEM_APPROVAL') AND created_at <= #{threshold}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE status IN ('PENDING_DEVICE_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_SYSTEM_APPROVAL') AND created_at <= #{threshold}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND sign_status = 'NOT_CHECKED_IN' AND start_time <= #{deadline}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND sign_status IN ('CHECKED_IN', 'CHECKED_IN_TIMEOUT') AND checked_in_at IS NOT NULL AND checked_in_at <= #{deadline}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE status = 'PENDING_MANUAL' AND updated_at <= #{deadline}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND start_time >= #{start} AND start_time <= #{end}

SELECT id, batch_id, user_id, created_by, reservation_mode, device_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, approval_mode_snapshot, remark, device_approver_id, device_approved_at, device_approval_remark, system_approver_id, system_approved_at, system_approval_remark, sign_status, checked_in_at, cancel_reason, cancel_time, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status = 'APPROVED' AND start_time >= #{start} ORDER BY start_time ASC
